name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: What you can do to give us a fighting chance, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If the speakers at our convention made one thing crystal clear, it's that everything we value is on the line this November. |
---
Peter,

The convention is over. Joe and Kamala are our official Democratic nominees for President and Vice President.

[And now I'm asking you to chip in $25 to help them win.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd")

As Joe's Finance Director, it's my job to raise the money we need to beat Donald Trump. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask you to make your first donation today.

Look, Peter, I can't promise you that $25 today will guarantee that we win this election. And I know that now is not an easy time to give your hard-earned dollars to a political campaign.

**But I can promise you that, if you 're able to give, the contribution you make will go straight towards funding the work that's going to give us a fighting chance at this thing.**

[So, Peter, can you come through today with a $25 donation to fund our campaign to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd") | **Biden-Harris Supporter Record**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Grassroots Donor Status:** Pending

[Joe and Kamala need you now, Peter. Chip in $25 and join the 3 million grassroots donors standing with them.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

If the speakers at our convention made one thing crystal clear, it's that everything we value is on the line this November, and we only get one shot at preventing another four years of Donald Trump.

And the $25 I'm asking you to give today is what I know will be what we need to make that shot count, Peter.

Because when you and millions of folks like you make an investment in funding our campaign -- even $25 at a time -- it's that much more I can put to work fighting for every vote.

So, I have to ask you one last time. If you're able to give $25 or more today, can I count on you to pitch in to fuel our campaign to elect Joe and Kamala and defeat Trump?

[Click here to donate, Peter:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd") [https://go.joebiden.com/donate](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B4_noguarantees_X__F1_S2_C1__nd")

Thanks,

Katie Petrelius
Finance Director
Biden for President

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f0520/2359368122/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051f/2359368122/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051e/2359368122/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051d/2359368122/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051c/2359368122/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051b/2359368122/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051e/2359368122/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051a/2359368122/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f051d/2359368122/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78a/1cd0ac28/16ca5d3c6/357f0519/2359368122/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

“I’m with you, and I will fight for you, and I will win for you. To all Americans tonight, in all our cities and towns, I make this promise: We will Make America Strong Again. We will Make America Proud Again. We will Make America Safe Again. And, We will Make America Great Again.”

-President Donald J. Trump2016 Republican National Convention
Friend,

When I accepted the Republican Nomination for President of the United States in 2016 I promised you that I would spend every minute of the next four years putting America FIRST...
Now here we are again, and I can honestly say I have kept that promise to you.

These have been the hardest, but most rewarding four years of my life. We’ve faced more challenges than any other president in our Nation’s history, and despite the Left’s best efforts to BRING US DOWN, I will deliver a historic Presidential Acceptance Speech on August 27th.

In 2016, thousands of American Patriots contributed to get on the Official GOP Convention Donor List, where their names were broadcast LIVE during my speech.

This year, I want to go even bigger. I want to have a RECORD-BREAKING 1,000,000 American names displayed for the entire Nation to see. Just think, your name could be the very FIRST name displayed.

Now here we are again, and I can honestly say I have kept that promise to you. These have been the hardest, but most rewarding four years of my life. We’ve faced more challenges than any other president in our Nation’s history, and despite the Left’s best efforts to BRING US DOWN, I will deliver a historic Presidential Acceptance Speech on August 27th. In 2016, thousands of American Patriots contributed to get on the Official GOP Convention Donor List, where their names were broadcast LIVE during my speech. This year, I want to go even bigger. I want to have a RECORD-BREAKING 1,000,000 American names displayed for the entire Nation to see. Just think, your name could be the very FIRST name displayed. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IN THE NEXT 3 HOURS and be one of the first to have your name proudly displayed LIVE when I accept the nomination for President. CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT This speech will be a HUGE moment for our Nation, and I really want YOU to be a part of it. Immediately after my speech, my team will be handing me a list of Patriots whose names were displayed on the livestream - I hope I see YOUR NAME on there. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to have your name proudly displayed LIVE during my speech and to get on the list I see. Thank you, Donald J. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Mental Health, Planning for Schools, and Testing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n05cliXXpMqilu2Zfh-gNd1V9FXjY9Dqu-vFG9HXf72cAebdAwU8JU7b472md82y5mvaVr3cd1bROHPgZBfcO-jqHWoZIe_IobtQOEfZCgqKYX0-yCMtCkrcvWI8PLJMqAmKKa6WKuToey6W2Tt9UnqWm8GQQX3ozd4UeDEM0-Xqv5ZC8Y79KLr7P8qlE9AThqi6VnlzX_7cxK-4Tf1_by2KpFi2fDkcA_c6Hn8QxgJxK1TPmSYVr70FSsZPBb2QWYWu6edUbwtk1PiP8sd2QR-prhzGNmPbmrjigUb-jmfgzCBTcXTVyIDo9TG5lOaSwc03-OUWTb8=&c=c4_crhoACQDhDrXxW2gJ9GZaMal6UbVK9i-Oqs0ZBhvxHRf81GJMwA==&ch=AJmtYyjhI9XdbtIeYQGFED8g1aJz_da0l44VEfJnD8lyySqa5XKgnA==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
CHILDREN'S MENTAL HEALTH
Since the start of the pandemic, we've heard from parents and pediatricians about the toll this crisis has taken on our kids. There's no question that distance learning has been incredibly hard on our kids' mental health. Sadly, we've seen big increases in anxiety and suicidal ideations since this pandemic started.

If a child in your life is experiencing mental health issues, Kids' Link is available to you and your family 24/7 at 1-855-KID-LINK (1-855-543-5465). Kids' Link is a hotline that families can call when their child is feeling excessive anger or sadness, lashing out, having severe worries, or hurting themselves or others. You are not alone, and we are here to help you get through this.

To learn more about how we can support kids as they go back to school, RIDE Commissioner Infante-Green and I spoke with Dr. Jennifer Jencks and Barbara Austin, licensed social workers and children's mental health experts at Bradley Hospital, during this week's Back to School forum. You can watch that [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n05cliXXpMqilu2Zfh-gNd1V9FXjY9Dqu-vFG9HXf72cAebdAwU8JTr7i5Y-HJA8vY785-cDsgWQghjCY9ygAMmZ7r7rGbPoVEIXC5QsuGEp7eoseO5g-RRYTTo4cARj-cr96X3Qsn_eIZyAkuVd1WABGwuV46jC8JbumO4l9doSv-c89mlWxpc35E9YHZMuQtBQvafpC6s=&c=c4_crhoACQDhDrXxW2gJ9GZaMal6UbVK9i-Oqs0ZBhvxHRf81GJMwA==&ch=AJmtYyjhI9XdbtIeYQGFED8g1aJz_da0l44VEfJnD8lyySqa5XKgnA==).
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOL PLANS

We know there will be positive cases in each district as the year goes on, just like we know there will be positive cases among adults. We can't completely eliminate the virus, but we can stop it from spreading by planning thoroughly for every possibility. This will allow us to be smart and targeted in how we manage those cases while preventing an outbreak and limiting the disruption in learning, just like we've done with child care.
In order to to mitigate spread and keep students and staff safe, we are developing a plan for each possible scenario of COVID-19 cases in a school district. In every situation, the team at RIDOH will work with each district on a case-by-case basis. We have a detailed, 24-page health protocol playbook available on [Back2SchoolRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n05cliXXpMqilu2Zfh-gNd1V9FXjY9Dqu-vFG9HXf72cAebdAwU8JUE8NpgCr3-ZotTZvMood8gLbRKnX6feuvafkbIBP9uJP1gLHLLKITHBEwA7ls17fEDNEdimmPv2BsAp0HsA7by672rZNla2Ng==&c=c4_crhoACQDhDrXxW2gJ9GZaMal6UbVK9i-Oqs0ZBhvxHRf81GJMwA==&ch=AJmtYyjhI9XdbtIeYQGFED8g1aJz_da0l44VEfJnD8lyySqa5XKgnA==) that outlines the steps we will take in every scenario.
| | |
---|---
|
TESTING

One of the best defenses against COVID-19 is providing accurate and widely available testing to Rhode Islanders. It's important to have different options because what works for one person doesn't necessarily work for another.

If you have symptoms, you can schedule a test by calling your primary care provider. If you don't have one, you can call a community health clinic or respiratory clinic. You can find the full list of clinics at [health.ri.gov/covid](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n05cliXXpMqilu2Zfh-gNd1V9FXjY9Dqu-vFG9HXf72cAebdAwU8JSiXAyi8eJGK00h4G7nWLy6l6H14QGvKEPnkTmJJlBJWE-uyeK2g0GwYJlZZ8JIwlqO0GeismCa_zzQdTjaBy49kcy15L7hDrw==&c=c4_crhoACQDhDrXxW2gJ9GZaMal6UbVK9i-Oqs0ZBhvxHRf81GJMwA==&ch=AJmtYyjhI9XdbtIeYQGFED8g1aJz_da0l44VEfJnD8lyySqa5XKgnA==).

If you do not have symptoms but want to get tested, you can go to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n05cliXXpMqilu2Zfh-gNd1V9FXjY9Dqu-vFG9HXf72cAebdAwU8JZGOoDDgFb3ibY7OktCUZVLQeKRxwP_ddmymqJnA72a4p_habs-p-Vt-9M64hjVVYm6E-j_VuVqc4-bHOBF4BHU=&c=c4_crhoACQDhDrXxW2gJ9GZaMal6UbVK9i-Oqs0ZBhvxHRf81GJMwA==&ch=AJmtYyjhI9XdbtIeYQGFED8g1aJz_da0l44VEfJnD8lyySqa5XKgnA==). This is for anybody who falls into one of these categories:

* Close contact workers
* First responders
* Bus drivers
* Child care workers
* 18-to-39-year-olds
* Anyone who recently attended a large protest or demonstration
* Anyone who is traveling to a state that requires a test
* Anyone who is returning from a state on RI's quarantine list, which is available on [health.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n05cliXXpMqilu2Zfh-gNd1V9FXjY9Dqu-vFG9HXf72cAebdAwU8JUDmJLNcUx2SHZphsxmKrR-MbO3U9e-UdLOPsPElEaPGd5UGU1e1KCMEa7e--EOC8vRDtRYFP_5WBVaemRa763w=&c=c4_crhoACQDhDrXxW2gJ9GZaMal6UbVK9i-Oqs0ZBhvxHRf81GJMwA==&ch=AJmtYyjhI9XdbtIeYQGFED8g1aJz_da0l44VEfJnD8lyySqa5XKgnA==)

| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates tomorrow at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week. If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: ==. The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19. | | | ---|--- | CHILDREN'S MENTAL HEALTH Since the start of the pandemic, we've heard from parents and pediatricians about the toll this crisis has taken on our kids. There's no question that distance learning has been incredibly hard on our kids' mental health. Sadly, we've seen big increases in anxiety and suicidal ideations since this pandemic started. If a child in your life is experiencing mental health issues, Kids' Link is available to you and your family 24/7 at 1-855-KID-LINK (1-855-543-5465). Kids' Link is a hotline that families can call when their child is feeling excessive anger or sadness, lashing out, having severe worries, or hurting themselves or others. You are not alone, and we are here to help you get through this. To learn more about how we can support kids as they go back to school, RIDE Commissioner Infante-Green and I spoke with Dr. Jennifer Jencks and Barbara Austin, licensed social workers and children's mental health experts at Bradley Hospital, during this week's Back to School forum. You can watch that ==. | | | ---|--- | SCHOOL PLANS We know there will be positive cases in each district as the year goes on, just like we know there will be positive cases among adults. We can't completely eliminate the virus, but we can stop it from spreading by planning thoroughly for every possibility. This will allow us to be smart and targeted in how we manage those cases while preventing an outbreak and limiting the disruption in learning, just like we've done with child care. In order to to mitigate spread and keep students and staff safe, we are developing a plan for each possible scenario of COVID-19 cases in a school district. In every situation, the team at RIDOH will work with each district on a case-by-case basis. We have a detailed, 24-page health protocol playbook available on == that outlines the steps we will take in every scenario. | | | ---|--- | TESTING One of the best defenses against COVID-19 is providing accurate and widely available testing to Rhode Islanders. It's important to have different options because what works for one person doesn't necessarily work for another. If you have symptoms, you can schedule a test by calling your primary care provider. If you don't have one, you can call a community health clinic or respiratory clinic. You can find the full list of clinics at ==. If you do not have symptoms but want to get tested, you can go to ==. This is for anybody who falls into one of these categories: Close contact workers First responders Bus drivers Child care workers 18-to-39-year-olds Anyone who recently attended a large protest or demonstration Anyone who is traveling to a state that requires a test Anyone who is returning from a state on RI's quarantine list, which is available on == | I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates tomorrow at 1 p.m. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update Aug 14 - Aug 23
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [Click here to see a web copy of this email](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=106A159A20A1106)

---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK

With just 72 days until Election Day, the entire American election process is up in the air as Democrats race to find the weak links for exploitation. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, who has long pushed for an unnecessary universal mail-in voting process, is now fueling the engineered chaos surrounding our U.S. Postal Service. This weekend, she called a rare "emergency" session in the middle of summer recess so the U.S. House of Representatives could vote on a $25 billion funding bill for the U.S. Post Office that Democrats say is needed to ensure their mail-in election.

What's clear is that Democrats' goal is not to see a free and fair election for every American. Our election processes are vulnerable from beginning to end, and those vulnerabilities are being exploited by groups who subvert our systems to serve their purposes. We know that universal vote by mail, or sending ballots to everyone on the voter rolls, opens numerous doors to election fraud, inaccuracies, and delays. It is a way to send mail ballots to incorrect or ineligible voters, circumvent voter ID laws, and cause voter confusion and intimidation. We cannot allow our elections to be altered without our consent, and we must protect our voting rights in the face of these efforts.

Voting isn't enough this year. We need you to join us in this fight to ensure a free, fair, and secure election all.

Onward!
Catherine Engelbrecht
---
| |
---
|
---
| | CATCH OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE & TRUE
---
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | THIS WEEK | Red, White & True News #14 | Mass Mail Mayhem: 2020 Election Goes Postal [WATCH NOW >](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=106A159A20A1124)
Subscribe to the podcast today to get notice as soon as new episodes post. PREVIOUS EPISODES:
Episode 13 | 5 Easy Ways to Steal an Election and How You Can Stop It [WATCH NOW >](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1032)
Episode 12 | November is Coming... [WATCH NOW >](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1036)
Episode 11 | The Truth About Soros, BLM, and Elections [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1015)
Episode 10 | TX Attorney General Ken Paxton [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1016)
Episode 9 | Debbie D’Souza [WATCH NOW >](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1017)
Episode 8 | Citizen Watchdog Colleen Vera [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1018)
Episode 7 | Dinesh D'Souza [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1019)

To see all previous episodes please visit [here](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=101A150A21A1031).

---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | TAKE ACTION

1\. Make a plan to vote in person. It's the best way to ensure your vote counts. And share that information with your friends and family. Despite Democrats' push for a mail-in election, the U.S. Postal Service warned us all last week that "it cannot guarantee all ballots cast by mail for the November election will arrive in time to be counted, even if mailed by state deadlines, raising the possibility that millions of voters could be disenfranchised." ([Associated Press](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=106A159A20A1134), "Post Office warns states across US about mail voting," 8/15/2020)

2\. Become a poll worker. National Poll Worker Recruitment Day is on September 1, and this is great opportunity to [sign up to work the polls](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=106A159A20A1135) and strengthen our democracy right in your community. Serving your community at the polls is also an amazing way to work with friends and neighbors from other parties and unite around the issue of election integrity for all voters. America needs more poll workers now to ensure a safe, secure, and accessible election in November. Plus, most poll workers get paid! Learn more: [HelpAmericaVote.gov](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=106A159A20A1136).

3\. Get trained. Take our [online election worker trainings](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=106A159A20A1137) on your own time, in your own home. We are training a broad base of volunteers to defend election integrity in polling places, voter registries, mail-in ballot review board, and final tabulations.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK With just 72 days until Election Day, the entire American election process is up in the air as Democrats race to find the weak links for exploitation. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, who has long pushed for an unnecessary universal mail-in voting process, is now fueling the engineered chaos surrounding our U.S. Postal Service. This weekend, she called a rare "emergency" session in the middle of summer recess so the U.S. House of Representatives could vote on a $25 billion funding bill for the U.S. Post Office that Democrats say is needed to ensure their mail-in election. What's clear is that Democrats' goal is not to see a free and fair election for every American. Our election processes are vulnerable from beginning to end, and those vulnerabilities are being exploited by groups who subvert our systems to serve their purposes. We know that universal vote by mail, or sending ballots to everyone on the voter rolls, opens numerous doors to election fraud, inaccuracies, and delays. It is a way to send mail ballots to incorrect or ineligible voters, circumvent voter ID laws, and cause voter confusion and intimidation. We cannot allow our elections to be altered without our consent, and we must protect our voting rights in the face of these efforts. Voting isn't enough this year. We need you to join us in this fight to ensure a free, fair, and secure election all. Onward! In it, Joe Biden prioritized unity over divisiveness and _actually_ acknowledged the deep pain and insecurity Americans are feeling right now. Listening to Joe's speech, I was reminded of the type of**empathetic** leadership President Trump sorely lacks.

If you're serious about our democracy, then you can't afford to stay on the sidelines in this election. |

---
Peter,

I told you in my speech to the Democratic Convention that we _all_ need to do more to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next President and Vice President of the United States.

I hope that you heard me loud and clear, and that you're ready to [chip in $25 or whatever you can afford right now to help keep Joe and Kamala's campaign running strong.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Here's why this matters so much, Peter: Our country's future hangs on this election, and **I can tell you from experience that the final months of the campaign won 't be easy.**

But if you believe in an America where everybody has a fair shot at opportunity; where facts and science matter; where we guarantee that every single American citizen has equal representation in our government; and where our government actually works for the people it's supposed to represent -- then I'm asking you to join me in making sure that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris win in November.

**Let me be clear, Peter: if you 're serious about our democracy, then you can't afford to stay on the sidelines in this election.** You've got to get into this fight for the soul of America alongside Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- because democracy isn't a spectator sport, and they need all of our help right now.

[That's why I'm asking you to get involved right now, by chipping in $25 or whatever you can spare to help Joe and Kamala win this election:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

name: Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: less than 1%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
we can't take anything for granted
|
---

| | Derek,

Democrats have been gaining ground in the Commonwealth -- and making some meaningful change! We're hoping to keep the blue wave going, but it's important that we keep in mind that Virginia is **not** solidly blue. As Team Warner charts a plan to Election Day, we're remembering the past.

We can't take a single vote for granted. **In 2014, Mark Warner won his Senate election by less than 1%.** That's why we're so focused on laying the groundwork now for a successful Election Day this November. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db27/53d9897e/54286c92/1c88322f/1096593056/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-winbig?refcode=20200823_f_1_nd__720__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
With the election less than three months away we're working overtime to get the word out about all the ways Mark Warner has helped move Virginia forward in the Senate. His priorities include:
* Making health care more affordable, including lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and protecting coverage for those with pre-existing medical conditions;
* Leading reforms to military housing, to make sure that those who pledged to serve our country have safe and affordable housing;
* Supporting job training centers across the Commonwealth so no one has to leave Virginia to find a world-class job;
* Working to pass a bill that would ensure our elections are fair and free of foreign interference;
* And continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make sure that Virginians have the support they need during the coronavirus pandemic.

While Mark is working hard in the Senate, the Trump campaign and the GOP are making **huge** investments to turn Virginia red on Election Day. It's critical that we reach as many voters as possible across the Commonwealth in the next three months to secure strong victory.

We need your help. **If you have the means, will you support Mark Warner 's re-election campaign?**

clean_body: we can't take anything for granted | | | Derek, Democrats have been gaining ground in the Commonwealth -- and making some meaningful change! We're hoping to keep the blue wave going, but it's important that we keep in mind that Virginia is not solidly blue. As Team Warner charts a plan to Election Day, we're remembering the past. We can't take a single vote for granted. In 2014, Mark Warner won his Senate election by less than 1%. That's why we're so focused on laying the groundwork now for a successful Election Day this November. | "" With the election less than three months away we're working overtime to get the word out about all the ways Mark Warner has helped move Virginia forward in the Senate. His priorities include: Making health care more affordable, including lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and protecting coverage for those with pre-existing medical conditions; Leading reforms to military housing, to make sure that those who pledged to serve our country have safe and affordable housing; Supporting job training centers across the Commonwealth so no one has to leave Virginia to find a world-class job; Working to pass a bill that would ensure our elections are fair and free of foreign interference; And continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make sure that Virginians have the support they need during the coronavirus pandemic. While Mark is working hard in the Senate, the Trump campaign and the GOP are making huge investments to turn Virginia red on Election Day. It's critical that we reach as many voters as possible across the Commonwealth in the next three months to secure strong victory. We need your help. If you have the means, will you support Mark Warner 's re-election campaign?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thank you for your support! -- Your friends at Mark Warner for Virginia "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Team MJ
subject: Sen. Cornyn doesn't get it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
He thinks expanded unemployment insurance was "a mistake."

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe5/7f51f7bc/43ec3549/4ef7de37/642670959/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Sen. Cornyn really doesn't get what Texans are going through, Peter.

**First he called expanded unemployment insurance during this pandemic "a mistake."** Then, he wasted _months_ while a bill to extend unemployment insurance sat gathering dust on Mitch McConnell's desk. Now, he's left town as the Senate adjourned for a recess! | [GET HIM OUT >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe5/7f51f7bc/43ec3549/4ef7de36/642670959/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200823.1nd__1955__&amount=10")
---
It's unbelievable. Texans are facing an unprecedented crisis. Hundreds of thousands have lost their jobs while a public health emergency ravages our state. Many families are barely able to afford food and health care, in a state that _already_ had the highest uninsured rate in the country.

MJ gets it. She grew up in a working-class family and knows just how hard it can be to put food on the table. She's waited tables, worried about unpaid bills, and faced company layoffs with a preexisting condition -- her pregnancy. She's lived it, so she gets it.

In the midst of the worst pandemic in generations, we deserve better than a senator who calls that "a mistake."

**[Help us elect MJ Hegar to the Senate, because she gives a damn about Texas families.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe5/7f51f7bc/43ec3549/4ef7de36/642670959/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200823.1nd__1955__&amount=10")**

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18816015/240660471/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmYyYWEwMS03M2U1LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rpYUgaL8Oi6YZ1HSYAVTuNKUsn_BWv2kH0YDdiFJ6I=&emci=0bc426c1-64e5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=42f2aa01-73e5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10438639) _Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. [**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18816016/240660472/1282771135?refcode=08232020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmYyYWEwMS03M2U1LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rpYUgaL8Oi6YZ1HSYAVTuNKUsn_BWv2kH0YDdiFJ6I=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, Yesterday, the Austin Asian Communities Civic Coalition held a candidate forum for all of the Travis County Congressional districts. [You can view the forum here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18816017/240660473/1171866442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmYyYWEwMS03M2U1LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rpYUgaL8Oi6YZ1HSYAVTuNKUsn_BWv2kH0YDdiFJ6I=&emci=0bc426c1-64e5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=42f2aa01-73e5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10438639). The questions for TX-17 candidates begin at the 53 minute mark. Pete Sessions avoided answering the moderator's direct questions, and instead talked about the strength of the stock market and the need for law and order. The first question was about the most important issue on his website - stopping welfare abuse by illegal immigrants. Sessions claimed that it's _not_ his most important issue and pivoted to the party line touting the strength of the stock market. The issue is in fact the __only__ issue he addresses on his website. When challenged in a follow up question that the stock market doesn't reflect the general economy, he falsely claims that Steve Mnuchin is a Democrat, and implies that since "only 1 in 64 Americans" has tested positive for COVID-19, we need to get our kids back to school so we can all go back to work. The death toll has passed 175,000. Finally, I encourage you to go to the 1:30 mark. When asked in a follow up whether President Trump respects the rule of law, he says, "you know what I'm in reference to - I'm in reference to Portland, Minneapolis, Chicago..." In Session’s interpretation, rule of law applies to heavy-handed suppression of protests but not to potential crimes committed by those in Trump’s administration or by the president himself. Sessions' strategy was to de-emphasize the economic and health impacts of the coronavirus pandemic, while I spoke about needing an effective government response that will allow us to recover. We need new leadership, not more of the same. _**[Demand Better. Pitch in now and help me beat Pete](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18816018/240660474/-1907457920?refcode=08236_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmYyYWEwMS03M2U1LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rpYUgaL8Oi6YZ1HSYAVTuNKUsn_BWv2kH0YDdiFJ6I=).**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18816019/240660475/-1907457920?refcode=0823_Donor_Button50&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmYyYWEwMS03M2U1LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5rpYUgaL8Oi6YZ1HSYAVTuNKUsn_BWv2kH0YDdiFJ6I=)

name: Ossoff Video Team
subject: 📺 Keep our new ad on the air
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Jon's promise to fight corruption |
---
_Friend, this race is neck and neck in the polls, and we need to amplify our message to as many voters as possible._

**We just launched a new ad where Jon promises to end this corruption and put working families and small businesses in Georgia first!**

But staying on the airwaves isn't cheap, and we're up against Mitch McConnell and his network of dark money groups.

**[Will you watch our new ad today, and chip in a few dollars to help us keep it on the air?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c7/5b2c1286/3f6f6de0/25f0634f/1663756241/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_23_hurting?refcode=em_2020_08_23_hurting")** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c7/5b2c1286/3f6f6de0/25f0634e/1663756241/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_23_hurting?refcode=em_2020_08_23_hurting_img") | | [WATCH NOW >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c7/5b2c1286/3f6f6de0/25f06351/1663756241/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_23_hurting?refcode=em_2020_08_23_hurting_button")
---

Friend, in this crisis, Georgians are struggling mightily to pay rent and put food on their table -- and Senator David Perdue doesn't have their backs.

He fought against $1,200 stimulus checks for workers, and has led the fight to cut unemployment insurance -- _while at the same time he gave billions to his corporate donors._

**Perdue puts the donors and lobbyists who fund his campaign first -- ahead of ordinary Georgians.**

_Jon's campaign isn't taking contributions from corporate PACs._ He is running a true grassroots campaign, and will be accountable to the people.

**[Help share Jon's vow to root out corruption to as many voters as possible so he can beat Perdue!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c7/5b2c1286/3f6f6de0/25f0634f/1663756241/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_23_hurting?refcode=em_2020_08_23_hurting")**

Thanks for being part of this grassroots movement,

Team Ossoff

name: Senator Terry Van Duyn
subject: Join Congressman Jamie Raskin and I in support of Kathy Manning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
RSVP Today!
|
---

| | Dear friends, I have spent the last six years in service to our great state working to fully fund our educator's needs, expand Medicaid, protect our natural resources, and North Carolinians right to vote. But I must be honest, our work requires federal partners who support our families. [**That is why I am reaching out to you today.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ba/3d199a51/2fa3f307/7364b38a/3837488420/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmavl") In less than three months we'll have the opportunity to do some amazing things, including electing my friend, Kathy Manning, to the United States Congress, representing the Triad. Kathy is working hard to help our local house and senate candidates flip the legislature. She is also working with our Court of Appeals and Supreme Court candidates to ensure we retain a strong independent judiciary across our great state. [**Join us this Thursday, August 27th for an intitmate conversation on the United States Postmaster General, North Carolina, and our pathway to victory.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ba/3d199a51/2fa3f307/7364b38a/3837488420/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmavl") **We are well-positioned to flip Congressional District-6 for the first time in 30 years! ** As a former whip, I must speak to the importance of this opportunity. Kathy's district covers two critical North Carolina Senate seats and two critical North Carolina House seats. Through this district, we have the power to increase voter turnout and flip the North Carolina General Assembly as well. [**I am hosting a virtual event for Kathy on Thursday, August 27th from 6:30 PM to 7:30 PM and I would love to see you there.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ba/3d199a51/2fa3f307/7364b38a/3837488420/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmavl") It's going to take all of us working together to flip the 6th and turn North Carolina Blue. **Join our efforts today. ** For our future, Senator Terry Van Duyn [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ba/3d199a51/2fa3f307/7364b38b/3837488420/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmavl")
[**Click here to RSVP.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ba/3d199a51/2fa3f307/7364b38a/3837488420/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmavl") **For more information contact Sean@KathyManningForNC.com** |
---

| | Peter, we’re running out of time to keep our digital ads running. If we don’t raise $5,000 before midnight, we’ll have to pull our ads down and STOP reaching out to voters about our people-powered campaign. That’s a HUGE PROBLEM. Our Republican opponent is sitting on over a million dollars, and he’s being propped up by multiple dark money organizations running ads in the district. body:
---
| | [**MCCONNELL: I will BLOCK Democrats' emergency Post Office funding**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30") [I'm furious beyond belief. House Democrats and I just passed an emergency bill to save the USPS from bankruptcy, but Mitch McConnell just announced he will BLOCK our bill in the Senate. I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to FORCE the Senate to take up this bill and rescue the Post Office. Quickly -- will you sign your name? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30") | I just took one of the most important votes of my life -- and passed emergency funding for the Post Office.

[_**But Mitch McConnell just announced he will BLOCK our bill from passing in the Senate.**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")

[**_Quickly -- I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to FORCE McConnell to take up our bill and FUND the USPS before it collapses. This is the most important election of our lifetimes. We cannot allow Trump and McConnell to scheme their way to victory by sabotaging our Post Office. I need your signature before midnight tonight >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com******](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30") ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")**
---

I just took one of the most important votes of my entire life.

House Democrats and I rushed back to Washington to pass emergency Post Office funding before it collapses.

[**But Mitch McConnell just announced he will BLOCK our bill in the Senate. **](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")

[_**Hear me loud and clear: This CANNOT happen. I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to FORCE the Senate to take up this bill and pass emergency Post Office funding before it collapses >> **_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")

I've watched Mitch McConnell cover up Trump's despicable corruption.

I've watched him threaten our seniors' Medicare to fund tax breaks for the rich.

I've watched him play games with the benefits families need to keep the lights on during this crisis.

[**I will NOT watch him sabotage the Post Office, sabotage our votes, and sabotage our shot to vote him OUT of office.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")

[_**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need a POWERFUL uprising -- 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition -- calling on the Senate to pass immediate funding for our Post Office NOW. Will you sign your name before midnight? >> **_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e37d/1999770469/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200823_em_pet_b1_povvbrl_30")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e372/1999770469/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e373/1999770469/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e370/1999770469/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e371/1999770469/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e376/1999770469/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e377/1999770469/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e374/1999770469/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e370/1999770469/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e372/1999770469/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2bf/18e32a7f/4a3846f3/7b20e375/1999770469/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

[To celebrate this endorsement, we’re taking action by asking 5,000 grassroots supporters to stand with Eugene in the fight to protect our planet by calling for bold and aggressive action to stop climate change now. name: Allen, me (2)
subject: 72 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend ,

Earlier, our team emailed you a clear outline of the stakes we face in November.

On one hand, we have a divisive candidate running a campaign full of hateful rhetoric for media attention -- and on the other hand, we have a strong leader who’s ready to champion the issues working-class Texas families face on Day 1.

We need Sri Kulkarni in Congress, friend. If the past few months haven’t made it abundantly clear, TX-22 is in sore need of new leadership -- and we need someone who’s ready to take the charge on issues like expanding access to affordable health care and ensuring that our economic recovery works for all of us.

We have 72 days left to send Sri to Congress. That’s just a little over two months.

Can you chip in right now and help us power through the last two months of this election?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.23_am2_b1_all&amount=25

Thanks,

Allen

Allen Chen
Campaign Manager

---- Begin Forwarded Message ----

There are 73 days left until Election Day, friend -- and we can’t stress enough what our choices mean for Texas families.

On one hand, we have a proven leader for our district and nation who has dedicated his career to public service, restoring America’s global standing, and fighting for Texas families on issues like expanding health care and rebuilding our economy. That’s our candidate, Sri Kulkarni.
And on the other hand, we have Troy Nehls.

Troy Nehls is a police officer who was fired for mishandling evidence and lied about it on a future job application. He’s run a divisive, hateful campaign while appealing to corporate interests -- and as a pandemic rages through our district, he has repeatedly denied or downplayed its debilitating effects on our health and our livelihoods, even as his own employees have gotten sick.

Our choice is clear: We need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And we need you to stand with us. Chip in now to make your choice clear.

CHIP IN NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.23_am2_b1_all&amount=25

As this pandemic decimates our economy and way of life, we need a leader who will ensure that Congress passes policies based on the scientific advice of health care experts that will prioritize working families. That means we need a leader who knows the struggles working-class Texans face.

Sri is that leader.

Born into a middle-class family, Sri grew up in our district and knows firsthand the struggles many of us face. After his father died, the medical bills from his care overwhelmed his family. Now, Sri is fighting to ensure that everyone has access to affordable healthcare and that we rebuild our economy for working families.

We don’t need to send someone to Washington who will curry favor with dark money interests and fuel conspiracy theories about this pandemic for their own political gain. We need someone who ensures that our lives and livelihoods are at the forefront of our agenda.

The choice is clear -- we need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And in 74 days, we can send him there, but only with your support.

CHIP IN NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.23_am2_b1_all&amount=25

Thanks,
-- Team Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.23_am2_b1_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c154a479-80e5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/597b0aa3-87e5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdiMGFhMy04N2U1LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_4NTc9tpsrsGO5TykvaekSL5DA7F_l32aI3HY1eAf8=&id=117373579 .

We have 72 days left to send Sri to Congress. That’s just a little over two months. Can you chip in right now and help us power through the last two months of this election? Thanks, Allen Allen Chen Campaign Manager ---- Begin Forwarded Message ---- There are 73 days left until Election Day, friend -- and we can’t stress enough what our choices mean for Texas families. On one hand, we have a proven leader for our district and nation who has dedicated his career to public service, restoring America’s global standing, and fighting for Texas families on issues like expanding health care and rebuilding our economy. That’s our candidate, Sri Kulkarni. And on the other hand, we have Troy Nehls. Troy Nehls is a police officer who was fired for mishandling evidence and lied about it on a future job application. He’s run a divisive, hateful campaign while appealing to corporate interests -- and as a pandemic rages through our district, he has repeatedly denied or downplayed its debilitating effects on our health and our livelihoods, even as his own employees have gotten sick. Our choice is clear: We need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And we need you to stand with us. Chip in now to make your choice clear. CHIP IN NOW >> As this pandemic decimates our economy and way of life, we need a leader who will ensure that Congress passes policies based on the scientific advice of health care experts that will prioritize working families. That means we need a leader who knows the struggles working-class Texans face. Sri is that leader. Born into a middle-class family, Sri grew up in our district and knows firsthand the struggles many of us face. After his father died, the medical bills from his care overwhelmed his family. Now, Sri is fighting to ensure that everyone has access to affordable healthcare and that we rebuild our economy for working families. We don’t need to send someone to Washington who will curry favor with dark money interests and fuel conspiracy theories about this pandemic for their own political gain. We need someone who ensures that our lives and livelihoods are at the forefront of our agenda. The choice is clear -- we need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And in 74 days, we can send him there, but only with your support. CHIP IN NOW >> Thanks, -- Team Sri Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#] If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Joe Biden
subject: My newsletter for a historic moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
What an incredible August it has been for this campaign. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78c/1cd0ac28/16c052c70/357f0268/1028471949/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/")
---
_Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for August 23, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback [**here**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78c/1cd0ac28/16c052c70/357f0267/1028471949/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/newsletter-form?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2"). _
Peter,

What an incredible August it has been for this campaign.

I announced Kamala Harris as my running mate, we held a one-of-a-kind Democratic National Convention all across America, and on Thursday I accepted your nomination for President of the United States.

The last few weeks have been inspiring and humbling. Getting to hear from people across the country -- friends, family, and so many other folks -- about why they're supporting me and this campaign for the presidency is something I'll never forget.

I'll be frank with you, Peter: these next 72 days won't be easy. But when I need strength, I'll think back to this week. And I hope you will too.

I'm excited to share in this newsletter all of what the campaign has been doing in August, but for now, I'll leave you with a line I quoted in my convention speech on Thursday from Ella Baker, a giant of the civil rights movement:

_" Give people light and they will find a way."_

I give you my word, Peter: If you entrust me with the presidency, I will draw on the best of us, not the worst. I will be an ally of the light, not of the darkness.

Now is the time for us to come together, to choose hope over fear, to give people the light.

Let's get to work. [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2")
**Campaign Updates**

I couldn't possibly sum up everything that was said over the four days of the Democratic National Convention _and_ everything else this campaign has been up to without making this email too long, so I'm excited to share just a few highlights with you.

[**But first -- if these moments moved you as much as they moved me, can you make your first donation to keep up this campaign 's momentum after an electric week? **](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2")

When I first met Brayden on the campaign trail, I saw a familiar anxiety on his face. It was the anxiety of a kid with a stutter, something I struggled to overcome when I was a kid, too. I told him then that we can't let the barriers in our life define us, and he took that message to heart. I'm proud to be a part of his story, and of the courage this remarkable young man had to share his story with the world on the last night of the convention. Click below to watch his speech:
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78c/1cd0ac28/16c052c70/357f025f/1028471949/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/DemConvention/status/1296635661684965378/")
Having my friend Jacquelyn nominate me for President of the United States meant the world to me. I'm so glad we got to share that elevator ride together, and that you were brave enough to say you supported me when so many were ready to count this campaign out. Jacquelyn, I hope you know -- we love you back.
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78c/1cd0ac28/16c052c70/357f025e/1028471949/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/JoeBiden/status/1295900540694433792/")
And this campaign has been doing even more than just holding a historic convention.

Earlier this month, I announced my Agenda for the Latino Community. As president, I'll invest in Latinos' economic mobility, make far-reaching investments in ending health disparities by race, expand access to high-quality education, and tackle racial inequity in our education system. I'll combat hate crimes and gun violence, and secure our values as a nation of immigrants. You can read my full plan by clicking on the images below:
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78c/1cd0ac28/16c052c70/357f025d/1028471949/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/the-biden-agenda-for-the-latino-community-4d7329c2644b")
And we made history in another way this month -- with the largest ad buy ever made by a general election presidential candidate. My team is planning to spend $280 million to advertise in battleground states online, on TV, and anywhere else we can reach voters.

**But here 's the truth: we still have to keep fundraising to make sure we can afford to run these ads _and_ fund our critical organizing work.**

[**That 's why I have to ask: can you make your first donation to power our campaign to victory in November? **](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2")

---
**What 's Coming**

Starting tomorrow, Donald Trump will hold the Republican National Convention. If I'm being honest, I hope you won't spend too much time watching it -- their week is sure to be dark and divisive, and there is so much organizing work to be done on our end instead.

So here's my ask: Will you do one extra thing this week to make sure Democrats up and down the ballot win in November? Whether it's talking with friends and family, making calls with my campaign, or making your plan to vote, everything you do today counts. Here's one of my favorite options:
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b78c/1cd0ac28/16c052c70/357f025c/1028471949/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://iwillvote.com/")
Peter, we only have 72 days left in this election, and every single one of those days matters.

My campaign is hosting virtual events, running our advertising programs, and implementing massive organizing plans across the country. And I'm so glad you're a part of it, Peter.

But running such an ambitious, historic campaign means we also have to set ambitious, historic fundraising goals. And since this is a grassroots campaign, we rely on supporters like you to reach them. That's why I'm asking, one more time: [**Will you chip in right now to power my campaign? Any amount you 're able to give will make a real difference. **](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.23_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T2")

---
I could keep reminiscing about these past few weeks for a lot longer, but that won't help us win votes in November, so it's time for me to wrap up.

But Peter, I hope you feel as energized and hopeful as I do right now -- for this campaign, and for our country's future.

This is our moment to decide who we are as Americans. And I know that with you by my side, Peter, we _can_ win this battle for the soul of the nation.

So for now -- keep the faith, and keep up the fight. We can do this.

_\- Joe_

P.S. I couldn't resist sharing one more photo, of a gift from my grandkids to celebrate my speech on Thursday night. And yes, I did enjoy some ice cream fresh from the box:

clean_body: What an incredible August it has been for this campaign. | | "" Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for August 23, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback "". Peter, What an incredible August it has been for this campaign. I announced Kamala Harris as my running mate, we held a one-of-a-kind Democratic National Convention all across America, and on Thursday I accepted your nomination for President of the United States. The last few weeks have been inspiring and humbling. Getting to hear from people across the country -- friends, family, and so many other folks -- about why they're supporting me and this campaign for the presidency is something I'll never forget. I'll be frank with you, Peter: these next 72 days won't be easy. But when I need strength, I'll think back to this week. And I hope you will too. I'm excited to share in this newsletter all of what the campaign has been doing in August, but for now, I'll leave you with a line I quoted in my convention speech on Thursday from Ella Baker, a giant of the civil rights movement: " Give people light and they will find a way." I give you my word, Peter: If you entrust me with the presidency, I will draw on the best of us, not the worst. I will be an ally of the light, not of the darkness. Now is the time for us to come together, to choose hope over fear, to give people the light. Let's get to work. "" Campaign Updates I couldn't possibly sum up everything that was said over the four days of the Democratic National Convention and everything else this campaign has been up to without making this email too long, so I'm excited to share just a few highlights with you. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" When I first met Brayden on the campaign trail, I saw a familiar anxiety on his face. It was the anxiety of a kid with a stutter, something I struggled to overcome when I was a kid, too. I told him then that we can't let the barriers in our life define us, and he took that message to heart. I'm proud to be a part of his story, and of the courage this remarkable young man had to share his story with the world on the last night of the convention. Click below to watch his speech: "" Having my friend Jacquelyn nominate me for President of the United States meant the world to me. I'm so glad we got to share that elevator ride together, and that you were brave enough to say you supported me when so many were ready to count this campaign out. Jacquelyn, I hope you know -- we love you back. "" And this campaign has been doing even more than just holding a historic convention. Earlier this month, I announced my Agenda for the Latino Community. As president, I'll invest in Latinos' economic mobility, make far-reaching investments in ending health disparities by race, expand access to high-quality education, and tackle racial inequity in our education system. I'll combat hate crimes and gun violence, and secure our values as a nation of immigrants. You can read my full plan by clicking on the images below: "" And we made history in another way this month -- with the largest ad buy ever made by a general election presidential candidate. My team is planning to spend $280 million to advertise in battleground states online, on TV, and anywhere else we can reach voters. But here 's the truth: we still have to keep fundraising to make sure we can afford to run these ads and fund our critical organizing work. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" What 's Coming Starting tomorrow, Donald Trump will hold the Republican National Convention. If I'm being honest, I hope you won't spend too much time watching it -- their week is sure to be dark and divisive, and there is so much organizing work to be done on our end instead. So here's my ask: Will you do one extra thing this week to make sure Democrats up and down the ballot win in November? Whether it's talking with friends and family, making calls with my campaign, or making your plan to vote, everything you do today counts. Here's one of my favorite options: "" Peter, we only have 72 days left in this election, and every single one of those days matters. My campaign is hosting virtual events, running our advertising programs, and implementing massive organizing plans across the country. And I'm so glad you're a part of it, Peter. But running such an ambitious, historic campaign means we also have to set ambitious, historic fundraising goals. And since this is a grassroots campaign, we rely on supporters like you to reach them. That's why I'm asking, one more time: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" I could keep reminiscing about these past few weeks for a lot longer, but that won't help us win votes in November, so it's time for me to wrap up. But Peter, I hope you feel as energized and hopeful as I do right now -- for this campaign, and for our country's future. This is our moment to decide who we are as Americans. And I know that with you by my side, Peter, we can win this battle for the soul of the nation. So for now -- keep the faith, and keep up the fight. We can do this. \- Joe P.S. I couldn't resist sharing one more photo, of a gift from my grandkids to celebrate my speech on Thursday night. And yes, I did enjoy some ice cream fresh from the box: "" | "" | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Webinar Invite: Bring Voter Registration Sunday to Your Church
body:
Peter,
Voter registration deadlines in states across the country are fast approaching. And with more than 15 million Christians not even registered to vote, we need your help.
It’s time for our 2nd annual **National Voter Registration Sunday**. On September 20, 2020, as a day for churches to encourage their congregants to register to vote, churches can host an in-person or online Voter Registration drive.
[Join us for a special webinar on Tuesday, August 25, 2020, at 7:00 PM ET / 4:00 PM PT](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk7dCg1thFzBZiqLuYRLPpJ_aHCKCWDrLcQEL7TYWkbyiHa_t43PzNA6KE-JPldkBWXVpEmDVPSZnkmrsVPn8E5g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e208023com01&n=1), to learn how you can help your church participate in this vital effort.
Whether you’re a pastor, church leader, or congregant, join us for this Voter Registration Sunday webinar. We will provide you with a step-by-step guide and a full non-partisan toolkit of resources with everything you need to help Christians register to vote.
The voice of the church is essential, let’s help every Christian get ready to vote.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk7dCg1thFzBZiqLuYRLPpJ_aHCKCWDrLcQEL7TYWkbyiHa_t43PzNA6KE-JPldkBWXVpEmDVPSZnkmrsVPn8E5g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e208023com01&n=2)
**Pray. Think. Vote.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e208023com01&n=3)
**P.S.** Please send this webinar invitation to your pastor or church leaders to join us for the Voter Registration Sunday webinar on August 25. They can learn more about National Voter Registration Sunday [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNElvZOspC_AA5USuqBlKgAR&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e208023com01&n=4).
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e208023com01&n=5).
