name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883218/3050889165/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark Warner is focused on in the Senate.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* After more than three and a half years of work, Mark and his colleagues in the Senate Intelligence Committee **[released the fifth and final volume of the Russia investigation](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883207/3050889165/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cbsnews.com/news/senate-report-russian-interference-2016-us-election/"),** detailing contacts between the Trump campaign and Russian operatives during the 2016 election. Mark will continue to work with the Intelligence Committee to prevent foreign interference in our elections. Sen. Warner encourages everyone to read the report and to draw their own conclusions.

* **[Mark continues to seek answers from Postmaster General Louis DeJoy](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883206/3050889165/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fredericksburg.com/news/local/stafford-residents-fed-up-with-poor-mail-delivery/article_a4da47bc-5280-555c-8c23-b9271560da27.html")** after changes made to USPS caused serious delays in mail to millions of Americans and created uncertainty around the feasibility of voting by mail. Although DeJoy says he will suspend his changes, more action needs to be taken to reverse what he has done.

* Joe Biden has been formally nominated as our candidate for president at the Democratic National Convention this week. **[Here's how Mark weighed in.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883205/3050889165/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nbc12.com/2020/08/18/sen-mark-warner-weighs-dnc-party-unity/")**

* Just because we're socially distancing doesn't mean we can't connect with our elected officials. Mark [**hosted his latest town hall on Facebook**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883204/3050889165/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/MarkWarnerVa/live_videos/") on Wednesday to answer questions about issues that matter the most to folks around the Commonwealth.

* Last week, **[Mark met with community leaders and health care professionals from Rockingham County and Harrisonburg](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883203/3050889165/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wmra.org/post/sen-warners-roundtable-discussion-harrisonburg#stream/0")** for a socially distanced roundtable discussion regarding health care concerns and solutions during the coronavirus pandemic. Harrisonburg and Rockingham County have been hit hard during this pandemic, and Mark will continue to work to ensure all Virginians get the relief they need.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883202/3050889165/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db25/53d9897e/542a7f3c/1c883201/3050889165/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

Add all that up and what do we get? **A terrified incumbent senator. And a race MJ. CAN. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: The very first woman to represent NC-06 →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Will you join me?
|
---

| | Quickly, I want to run some stats by you:
1. A woman has _**never**_ represented North Carolina's sixth district in the U.S. House of Representatives.

2. _**Only six**_ of the 333 people to represent North Carolina in the U.S.House have been women.

3. Even though women make up more than 51% of the population, we have _**never**_ had more than 100 Democratic women serve at the same time in the U.S. House of Representatives.

**North Carolina got a "D" rating for women's representation in the state's government and politics. _That 's not OK._** I founded Off the Sidelines, because I believe that when women have a seat at the decision-making table, we can make our country a better, more equitable place for everyone. **I 'm fighting to elect strong, progressive women up and down the ballot, and I couldn't be more excited to endorse and support Kathy as she runs to become the very first woman to represent North Carolina's 6th District in the House.** [_**Join me in supporting Kathy 's campaign today ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc10/1133448778/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?refcode=kme200820_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc11/1133448778/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=kme200820_m_&refcode2=17426")
---
| | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc0e/1133448778/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=kme200820_m_&refcode2=17426")

| | [Donate $25](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc0f/1133448778/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=kme200820_m_&refcode2=17426")
---
| | [Donate $100](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc0c/1133448778/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=kme200820_m_&refcode2=17426n}}_other&refcode2=17426")
---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc10/1133448778/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?refcode=kme200820_m_other&refcode2=17426")
---
Kathy has lived in North Carolina's 6th for 30 years, and for 30 years, Kathy has made meaningful contributions to make her community a better place to live for all North Carolinians.
As an immigration attorney and community leader, Kathy worked to ensure North Carolinians could afford to put food on the table and pay their bills. She fought to ensure everyone has an equal opportunity for strong education and jobs.
And Kathy saw firsthand how devastating the astronomical cost of health care can be on a family when her daughter was diagnosed with a chronic illness and her insurance company told her it would cost her thousands of dollars out of pocket a month to keep her daughter healthy.
[_**There 's no doubt in my mind -- we need someone with Kathy's personal and leadership experience in Congress. So if you are able, contribute today to make Kathy the very first woman to represent NC-06 in the House.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b7/3d199a51/2fa13fc0/7364bc10/1133448778/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200820?refcode=kme200820_m_other&refcode2=17426")
Thank you,
Senator Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Week in Review on the Trail 🇺🇸
body:
| | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/4lgx4hmh1k-2088450?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=00ab65b568&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| |
---
| |
[NANCY MACE ISSUES DEBATE CHALLENGE, CHALLENGES CONGRESSMAN CUNNINGHAM TO FIVE DEBATES](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c2d771d7d5&e=f1831b4ca2)
On Thursday, Nancy Mace challenged Congressman Cunningham to FIVE debates. It's time for Congressman Cunningham to defend his record of voting with Nancy Pelosi 90% of the time. Congressman Cunningham responded by accepting only ONE debate. [Congressman Cunningham, we're waiting!](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=7fcdf5e8d3&e=f1831b4ca2)

---
|
---
| [BEAUFORT SMALL BUSINESS TOURS](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e545222437&e=f1831b4ca2)
On Tuesday, Nancy toured Beaufort small businesses to talk about her plan to quell their COVID-19 related losses by modifying the IRS rules and allowing them to deduct their losses when they are felt: now. She stopped by Harris Pillow Supply, Lulu Burgess, Rossignol's, and Tidal Creek Haven. [See pictures from her tours here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=88a89845eb&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---
| [VETERANS FOR MACE BEAUFORT VFW TOWN HALL](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f81c481a92&e=f1831b4ca2)
Nancy stopped by Beaufort VFW Post 8760 marking the second leg of Nancy's district-wide Veterans Town Hall Tour. [Watch the Facebook Live here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f04da0d57b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---
| [NANCY MACE AT THE CITADEL](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=adfcf109f8&e=f1831b4ca2)
On Friday, Nancy discussed her time at The Citadel as its first female graduate. Over 600 women have gone on to graduate from The Citadel since she graduated early in 1999. [Watch the interview here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=7fd11dc395&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [LIVE WITH BEAUFORT COUNTY HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=00ec91d1e8&e=f1831b4ca2)
On Wednesday evening, Nancy took questions from Beaufort High School students about her run for Congress. [W](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a6d9246edf&e=f1831b4ca2)[atch](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=4f278a9fd9&e=f1831b4ca2)[ the Q&A session on Facebook Live.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=952940a5d6&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=128527a7af&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Want to e-meet Nancy? Submit a scheduling request here to get a zoom on the books with your friends and/or family! [See this scheduling request here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2537468c24&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---
| null,

Touring businesses, stopping at the VFW in Beaufort, talking about my experience as the first female graduate of The Citadel, and, finally ... **challenging Congressman Cunningham to FIVE Debates** , this week was a big week!

Hope you like our Week in Review and will urge your friends and family to sign up [here](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e53cdd5629&e=f1831b4ca2).

Thank you so much for your support!

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I'm not worried about the Republican convention, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
They're going to tell lie after lie and try to scare the American people |
---
Peter, I'm not worried about the Republican convention this week. But I am worried about the kind of money they are going to raise.

We already know these folks' M.O. They're going to tell lie after lie and try to scare the American people into voting for four more years of their hateful and divisive agenda.

It couldn't be more different from the convention we watched this week, where we laid out our plan for a future that includes everyone, not just the people on our side of the aisle.

**Peter, I'll let you decide whether or not to tune in, but before you go today, I have a favor to ask you.**

Donald Trump and the Republicans are going to raise a whole lot of money off of their fear mongering this upcoming week, so we're relaunching our Beat Trump Fund to make sure our message of hope and unity reaches voters across the country.

Our goal is 500,000 online donations before Trump takes the stage on Thursday night. It's ambitious, but we can reach it if everyone does their part.

[Peter, if you can spare $25 today, will you pitch in to hit this goal and help us share our vision of a better America with more voters? ](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B2_kdh-rnc_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B2_kdh-rnc_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: They're going to tell lie after lie and try to scare the American people | Peter, I'm not worried about the Republican convention this week. But I am worried about the kind of money they are going to raise. We already know these folks' M.O. They're going to tell lie after lie and try to scare the American people into voting for four more years of their hateful and divisive agenda. It couldn't be more different from the convention we watched this week, where we laid out our plan for a future that includes everyone, not just the people on our side of the aisle. Peter, I'll let you decide whether or not to tune in, but before you go today, I have a favor to ask you. Donald Trump and the Republicans are going to raise a whole lot of money off of their fear mongering this upcoming week, so we're relaunching our Beat Trump Fund to make sure our message of hope and unity reaches voters across the country. Our goal is 500,000 online donations before Trump takes the stage on Thursday night. It's ambitious, but we can reach it if everyone does their part. | A Message from Matt!
---
Can you believe that we are less than a month from the September 8th Republican Primary?
Its been a very busy week for our campaign, between the dozens of events around the district, releasing our new campaign ad, and receiving the endorsement of former NH US Senator John E. Sununu! There is still plenty to do between now and Primary Day and we need your help. If you want to [place a yard sign in front of your home follow this secure link](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDk0MzE4MzEwNTI5OTYzNzczJmM9dTRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTM0Mjg0MjYmZD10NHc5YjFq.dhUrtxE7CKaY8steK5lrbopyvC-XzCNAao1StstfEnw), and if you are able [consider making a small donation to our campaign here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDk0MzE4MzEwNTI5OTYzNzczJmM9dTRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTM0Mjg0MzgmZD16OHQ3cjJt.JuwTPvjbgxPZJYAXJN_haCKQZMZGOcRutBJXzLSr2Mc). Thank you all for your support! \- Matt

| [Senator John Sununu endorses Matt Mayberry for US Congress](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDk0MzE4MzEwNTI5OTYzNzczJmM9dTRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTM0Mjg0ODAmZD1wMHczbDN0.uYXEWYR1nNT8BCNIbOe3Men_QWQJM2xUWX4bdBX658Y)
---
Today, NH First District Congressional Candidate Matt Mayberry was endorsed by former NH U.S. Senator John E. Sununu. Statement from Matt Mayberry: “I am humbled and honored to have the endorsement of former United States Senator John Sununu. Senator Sununu is a committed conservative who stood strong for New Hampshire values during his time in the U.S. Senate, and that’s exactly the kind of Congressman I will be for New Hampshire’s First District. This endorsement is an absolute game-changer. While my opponent touts endorsements from DC and NJ, my campaign is racking up endorsements where it matters – right here in New Hampshire.“ Sununu served NH in the U.S. Senate from 2003-2009. Prior to his time in the Senate, he held NH’s First District Congressional seat, which Mayberry is now seeking. The Mayberry campaign has now released over 600 public endorsements from NH leaders and Republican activists, including 1 U.S. Senator, 2 U.S. Congressmen, 2 NH Governors, 3 former Speakers of the NH House, 2 former Manchester Mayors and hundreds of current and former state legislators and local government officials.

| [NH Primary Source: Mayberry lands endorsements by four big-name NH Republicans](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDk0MzE4MzEwNTI5OTYzNzczJmM9dTRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTM0Mjg1MTYmZD1nMmkyYzdk.ZVzOgOrv5HRkyZ7Qc6pUL4HC-y2UW48Qoopl8h4_KXI)
---
**Douglas, Duprey, Semprini, Judy Baldasaro back Republican 1st District U.S. House candidate** **FOUR KEY ENDORSEMENTS.** Four longtime GOP stalwarts, including a former congressman and two former NHGOP chairs, have signed on with 1st District U.S. House candidate Matt Mayberry. Backing the former Dover city councilor and Human Rights Commissioner are party stalwarts former U.S. Rep. Chuck Douglas, former NHGOP chair and Republican National Committeeman Steve Duprey, former NHGOP chair Wayne Semprini and current Donald Trump national convention delegate Judy Baldasaro. “I have known Matt for over 30 years and I know that his priority will always be bringing our New Hampshire values to Washington, not the other way around,” said Douglas, who is also a former New Hampshire Supreme Court associate justice. “Matt Mayberry is a real deal New Hampshire conservative.” “It is crucial that Republicans nominate a candidate that can beat Chris Pappas in November,” said Duprey. “This is one of the most competitive seats in the country and Matt Mayberry can win. Matt has dedicated his life to service, first in the Air Force, then as a Dover City Councilor and as an avid community volunteer. Matt Mayberry knows New Hampshire -- every village, town and city. That will count when he is in Congress.” “If Republicans want to beat Chris Pappas this fall, Matt Mayberry has the best chance of getting the job done. Matt knows this state and relates best to our core New Hampshire values. Over the past 30 years, no one has worked harder to get Republicans elected in New Hampshire,” said Semprini. Baldasaro called Mayberry “a true patriot” who has been “loyal to President Trump and will serve our state with honor in Washington.” Mayberry said his campaign now has more than 500 public endorsements. “Over the past few weeks, momentum for our grassroots New Hampshire campaigns has really skyrocketed," he said. "New Hampshire leaders and voters alike are beginning to notice that our campaign is the only true New Hampshire campaign and that the only way that Republicans will defeat Chris Pappas in November is by nominating a real New Hampshire conservative, not a Washington, D.C. insider.” Mayberry faces former State Department official Matt Mowers in a GOP primary to take on U.S. Rep. Pappas in the general election.

| As a proud Air Force Veteran, I will make fighting for my fellow veterans a top priority when I am in Congress.

Since separating from the Air Force, I have remained very active in New Hampshire’s veteran community. I spearheaded a boot, sneakers and jeans drive for Liberty House, the homeless veterans shelter in Manchester. I also work with the Navy Chaplains Office and the Live Free or Die Chapter of the Nam Knights to make sure that active duty military families at the Portsmouth Naval Shipyard have the resources they need to get through the holidays and the winter months. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Mayberry For Congress Campaign Newsletter | | | | | A Message from Matt! Can you believe that we are less than a month from the September 8th Republican Primary? Its been a very busy week for our campaign, between the dozens of events around the district, releasing our new campaign ad, and receiving the endorsement of former NH US Senator John E. Sununu! There is still plenty to do between now and Primary Day and we need your help. If you want to , and if you are able . Thank you all for your support! \- Matt | | | | | | In the News! | | | | | | | | Today, NH First District Congressional Candidate Matt Mayberry was endorsed by former NH U.S. Senator John E. Sununu. Statement from Matt Mayberry: “I am humbled and honored to have the endorsement of former United States Senator John Sununu. Senator Sununu is a committed conservative who stood strong for New Hampshire values during his time in the U.S. Senate, and that’s exactly the kind of Congressman I will be for New Hampshire’s First District. This endorsement is an absolute game-changer. While my opponent touts endorsements from DC and NJ, my campaign is racking up endorsements where it matters – right here in New Hampshire.“ Sununu served NH in the U.S. Senate from 2003-2009. Prior to his time in the Senate, he held NH’s First District Congressional seat, which Mayberry is now seeking. The Mayberry campaign has now released over 600 public endorsements from NH leaders and Republican activists, including 1 U.S. Senator, 2 U.S. Congressmen, 2 NH Governors, 3 former Speakers of the NH House, 2 former Manchester Mayors and hundreds of current and former state legislators and local government officials. | | | | | Douglas, Duprey, Semprini, Judy Baldasaro back Republican 1st District U.S. House candidate FOUR KEY ENDORSEMENTS. Four longtime GOP stalwarts, including a former congressman and two former NHGOP chairs, have signed on with 1st District U.S. House candidate Matt Mayberry. Backing the former Dover city councilor and Human Rights Commissioner are party stalwarts former U.S. Rep. Chuck Douglas, former NHGOP chair and Republican National Committeeman Steve Duprey, former NHGOP chair Wayne Semprini and current Donald Trump national convention delegate Judy Baldasaro. “I have known Matt for over 30 years and I know that his priority will always be bringing our New Hampshire values to Washington, not the other way around,” said Douglas, who is also a former New Hampshire Supreme Court associate justice. “Matt Mayberry is a real deal New Hampshire conservative.” “It is crucial that Republicans nominate a candidate that can beat Chris Pappas in November,” said Duprey. “This is one of the most competitive seats in the country and Matt Mayberry can win. Matt has dedicated his life to service, first in the Air Force, then as a Dover City Councilor and as an avid community volunteer. Matt Mayberry knows New Hampshire -- every village, town and city. That will count when he is in Congress.” “If Republicans want to beat Chris Pappas this fall, Matt Mayberry has the best chance of getting the job done. Matt knows this state and relates best to our core New Hampshire values. Over the past 30 years, no one has worked harder to get Republicans elected in New Hampshire,” said Semprini. Baldasaro called Mayberry “a true patriot” who has been “loyal to President Trump and will serve our state with honor in Washington.” Mayberry said his campaign now has more than 500 public endorsements. “Over the past few weeks, momentum for our grassroots New Hampshire campaigns has really skyrocketed," he said. "New Hampshire leaders and voters alike are beginning to notice that our campaign is the only true New Hampshire campaign and that the only way that Republicans will defeat Chris Pappas in November is by nominating a real New Hampshire conservative, not a Washington, D.C. insider.” Mayberry faces former State Department official Matt Mowers in a GOP primary to take on U.S. Rep. Pappas in the general election. | | | | | | | | | Matt Mayberry for NH [9:46 AM - Aug 2, 2020]() | ---|---|---|--- | Great article about my campaign highlighting the anchor reason for my run: hundreds of veterans not getting the care they need or deserve. Many are coming home only to fight the battle of red tape especially our Vietnam era veterans. I need your help as we come into the final weeks. Please message me if you would like a yard sign, willing to volunteer and/or donate but remember the most important ways you can help: tell 2 friends about us and make sure you VOTE on Sept 8th. Thank you. [Congressional candidate Matt Mayberry says veterans 'need a champion']() [Ask Air Force veteran Matt Mayberry why he’s running for Congress and he’ll quickly tell you veterans in New Hampshire "need a champion]() | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | View our latest ad! | | | | | | | | | | | | Pics from the campaign trail! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Social media post of the week! | | | | | | | | | Matt Mayberry for NH [3:27 PM - Aug 6, 2020]() | ---|---|---|--- | As a proud Air Force Veteran, I will make fighting for my fellow veterans a top priority when I am in Congress. Since separating from the Air Force, I have remained very active in New Hampshire’s veteran community. I spearheaded a boot, sneakers and jeans drive for Liberty House, the homeless veterans shelter in Manchester. I also work with the Navy Chaplains Office and the Live Free or Die Chapter of the Nam Knights to make sure that active duty military families at the Portsmouth Naval Shipyard have the resources they need to get through the holidays and the winter months. name: Voter Protection Fund | Ossoff for Senate
subject: We can't let them take away our democracy, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Georgia voters are at risk of being made inactive. |
---
Friend,

Election officials in Georgia are preparing to change tens of thousands of Georgia voter registrations to inactive status. **_It's one step closer to purging them from the voter rolls._**

So what can we do?

**Like President Obama said in his Convention speech, we can't let them take our democracy -- our power -- away.**

**We have to fight voter suppression as if our democracy is at stake.**

**Because it is.**

**[Jon Ossoff and our team are building a multifaceted ballot access program to mobilize and protect voters so every eligible Georgian can vote. Please, make a donation to our Voter Protection Fund to defend voting rights and protect our democracy.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25bf/5b2c1286/3f90b02a/25f062ca/3543914572/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_22_vpf?refcode=em_2020_08_24_vpf_na")**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: We Will NOT Cower to BLM & Antifa
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We will not be intimidated and we will not cower. Let me explain...** One week ago, racist agitator and DFL House candidate John Thompson made terroristic-like threats in a quiet neighborhood in Hugo, Minnesota. In front of women and children, Thompson screamed: "Don’t run now. Don’t run now racist white people. I’m here. Oh yeah, we pull up. We pulled the f– up,” [Thompson continued](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkLfjac_hOXOCluyVZcQGd6WAol791J3J6wmamka8qNjuorzrY2D5d9qZlgT7xRUNmHpZZfpHn7AdIITMKM65vxPhhykgOg3y_TDJ0sEOzBiPfcwjxpATFOdoOL_Jd7UwzA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=2). “Blue lives ain’t s–, and if people here don’t support black people, f– Hugo, Minnesota.” In response to this horrible event, Republican State Senator Roger Chamberlain and two GOP House candidates organized a rally on Saturday to show support for the police and America. It was an excellent idea that was gaining traction around the ranks of conservative activists. Even Alpha News reported on the event to its large Minnesota audience. But then, Sen Roger Chamberlain announced Friday afternoon (less than 24 hours out) that the event was being canceled due to "threats and the potential of violence". Chamberlain did what so many weak-kneed Republican legislators in this state often do: cower to the radical left. **It's Chamberlain and gang that caved to Democrats last year when they increased our taxes, making the sick tax permanent. And it was he and other Senate Republicans that refused to bring a vote on the Senate floor to End Walz' Emergency Powers in April and May, despite your calls and emails.** However, we at Action 4 Liberty didn't view this as just another disappointment by Republican leadership. This was different. It was the kind of cowardice that would embolden the fringe left and give BLM/Antifa power to cancel all future celebrations of our flag and country. In some ways, it was our side's version of allowing the 3rd Precinct to fall. **Can you imagine backing down from a pro-America flag rally in a small town park? If we can't peacefully assemble, we've lost our country!** So Action 4 Liberty quickly jumped into action with our strategic partners like Michele Even of MAGASOTA (Michele was our Activist of the Year in 2019) and the excellent team with the Recall Walz group. We all took over the hosting of the event and ensured that BLM/Antifa wouldn't win. We immediately helped promote on social media the renewed event and then fired off an email to tens of thousands of people late Friday night. On Saturday morning, hundreds of patriotic, American-loving Minnesotans drove to Lions Park in Hugo on short notice to wave the flag and celebrate our freedom. The event was a major success and there was no threat or incident to report. [](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vfYzCCxd5gSPFSCTyEpzlcJXO-XvjCL4rqYe4mPwn_nt1dpBuEtWCVXGOrvWCtG84tYwtMYjXKsIXmsbIsOQZw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=3) **We will not be intimidated and we will not cower. The freedom we enjoy in this country is too important to follow the failed leadership of people like Sen Chamberlain.** Let's be honest, the Democrats in this state are moving further and further to the far left. Our Governor is unilaterally declaring rights that he does not have. And he still has not withdrawn his endorsement of John Thompson. We clearly need a team of freedom fighters up at the Capitol who we can proudly claim as our own. Top notch candidates like Erik Mortensen in Shakopee. Action 4 Liberty is busy building this team so we do not keep losing to the radical left. **Help support Action 4 Liberty continue building the army of activists and team of freedom fighters so we can take back this state.** | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=4 "Support Action 4 Liberty") [Support Action 4 Liberty](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=5)
---
We have a big choice in the next couple of years. Either we continue allowing weak-kneed Republicans to derail our freedom movement or we **STAND UP** and start building a team of freedom fighters who won't back down to the fringe left.
If we don't start doing something about the Republicans in charge, then we will never End Walz' Emergency Power, never reduce taxes, never shrink the size and scope of government and never defeat the radical left agenda.
[**Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 or even $250 today to help us continue building the largest conservative grassroots movement in Minnesota.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_back_down_to_blm&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Support California Wildfire Evacuees
body: | | | | --- Friends, Two of the largest wildfires in California’s history are burning simultaneously. An unprecedented heat wave triggered 12,000 dry lightning strikes igniting 615 fires throughout the state, overwhelming our capacity. We are experiencing another round of lightning through Tuesday, so sticking with the theme of 2020: Yes, it can get worse. These fires have consumed 1.1 million acres in less than a week and displaced 240,000 Californians. Tragically five lives have been lost and over 1,000 structures destroyed. clean_body: | | | | Friends, Two of the largest wildfires in California’s history are burning simultaneously. An unprecedented heat wave triggered 12,000 dry lightning strikes igniting 615 fires throughout the state, overwhelming our capacity. We are experiencing another round of lightning through Tuesday, so sticking with the theme of 2020: Yes, it can get worse. These fires have consumed 1.1 million acres in less than a week and displaced 240,000 Californians. Tragically five lives have been lost and over 1,000 structures destroyed. Here’s how you can help: Immediate Recovery: Donate to the "Red Cross" Disaster Relief Fund: Due to COVID, fire evacuees are going into hotels rather than shelters, but they are running out of rooms. You can also donate "rewards points" to the Red Cross to help. Donate to a "Community Foundation": Community foundations get resources to local NGOs that support both the immediate relief work and the longer term recovery for families that have lost homes and businesses. Under the “relief fund” tab in the above link is a list of vetted community foundations and organizations that are supporting local recovery efforts. Host a "Fire Evacuee": For those in the region, you can offer to host fire evacuees through the free Open Homes service provided by AirBNB. If you know fire evacuees, you can help them by finding them housing through this service (many evacuees don’t have laptops or easy access to the internet). Fire Safety and Health Tips: Every Californian is impacted by these fires and we are under fire "red flag" warnings through Tuesday. Have a go-bag and evacuation plan ready, sign up for local emergency alerts, and improve your home's fire resilience by cleaning gutters and establishing a five-foot perimeter of dirt or rocks around your house. Learn more: Protect Your Health:** Please take smoke exposure seriously. Wear a mask with an N-95 filter if you're going outside and filter the air in your home. Prolonged exposure to wildfire smoke is directly linked to increases in cardiac arrest and stroke among seniors and weakened immune systems in the population more broadly which could lead to more severe COVID cases in the coming months. If you would like to learn more about some of the history of wildfire, impacts of climate change and the State's fire mitigation strategy, here's a . Thank you so much for your generous support of California fire evacuees. Please stay safe, Jessica Jessica Morse 1079 Sunrise Ave , Suite B-275, Roseville , CA 95661

BREAKING: PRESIDENT TRUMP ANNOUNCES SECOND-TERM AGENDA
Friend,

Unlike Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, who have vowed to DESTROY the American way of life, President Trump and Vice President Pence are promising to put YOU and your family first every single day.
- They will create MORE jobs, CUT taxes, PROTECT American jobs
- The Coronavirus will be ERADICATED
- America will END its reliance on China and bring back 1 MILLION manufacturing jobs
- Insurance premiums will be LOWERED, Social Security and Medicare will be protected, prescription drug prices will be CUT, and preexisting conditions will be covered
- School Choice will be provided to EVERY Child in America
- We will DRAIN THE SWAMP by passing Congressional term limits
- Law enforcement will be fully funded
- NO more sanctuary cities, human trafficking networks will be dismantled, and illegal immigrants will be BLOCKED from becoming eligible for taxpayer-funded welfare, healthcare, and free college tuition
- We will establish a permanently manned presence on the moon and send the first manned mission to Mars
- STOP Endless Wars and bring our troops homePresident Trump has always put America First with every decision that he makes, and we expect his second term as our President to be no different.

We know we can’t trust what the Fake News polls say, so we just launched the Official Trump Second-Term Agenda Survey, and President Trump has requested that we personally reach out to YOU to get input on what REAL Americans are thinking.

We’re sending him the FIRST round of responses in ONE HOUR and we know he’ll want to see yours.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: My license plate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de01/1310148351/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

There's a Purple Heart emblem on my license plate. More than once, folks have kindly stopped to say thank you for serving -- but they direct it to my husband. He politely corrects them. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de00/1310148351/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200823.3nd__1971__&amount=10")
---
**I'm used to people underestimating me.** The Washington establishment underestimated me when I took them on to open military jobs to women. Now Sen. Cornyn is underestimating me and my team. He knows he's in trouble -- he wouldn't be calling in his allies to bail him out otherwise -- but he doesn't know just how much trouble he's in yet. He doesn't know that **[I have the support of folks like you.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de00/1310148351/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200823.3nd__1971__&amount=10")**

Not too many people know Sen. Cornyn around here, since he's spent 18 years in Washington peddling legislative favors to the special interests in exchange for campaign cash. Those who do know him don't much like him. Texans have a sensitive BS meter, and they know that despite his three terms in the Senate, he hasn't done diddly squat for us.

**Now, I won't lie, defeating a three-term incumbent senator won't be easy.** But I've got the scars on my arm and the Purple Heart on my license plate to remind me that I've been through **tougher situations** and made it out on top. Most of all -- I have you and a grassroots army on my side. **[Will you help me take on Sen. Cornyn and his big-money donors?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de00/1310148351/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200823.3nd__1971__&amount=10")**
\-- MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de00/1310148351/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200823.3nd__1971__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de07/1310148351/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1971&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de06/1310148351/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe1/7f51f7bc/43e63017/4ef7de05/1310148351/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We only have 72 days to make our work count, and people across this country are counting on us to get the job done. |
---
Peter, this quote from Michelle Obama's convention speech stuck with us all week: | [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B4_MOquote_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B4_MOquote_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1")
---
Two votes -- when we say we're fighting for every vote, that's what we mean. It's the difference between electing Joe and Kamala or giving Donald Trump four more years.

Earning those votes takes a lot of work -- and frankly, money. We've got to be able to compete in expensive battleground states and defend ourselves from any attacks Trump throws at us.

But we can't do that if we let Trump and the RNC outraise us again like they did in July, Peter. We know what a difference two votes makes -- imagine how many voters can be reached with $25 million. That's how much money they beat us by last month.

[**Peter, we need your support today to make our comeback this month and close the fundraising gap between us and Trump. Will you make your first donation to our Beat Trump Fund now and fuel our strategy to reach the voters we need to win?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B4_MOquote_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B4_MOquote_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1")

We only have 72 days to make our work count, and people across this country are counting on us to get the job done, Peter.

Making a $25 contribution today means that's $25 we can put to work to wage and win the battle for the soul of our nation.

**Last week Kamala and Joe showed us they 're ready. And this week, Trump and his buddies will show us what the next four years will look like if we miss our shot.**

[**So, let 's give this everything we've got, Peter. We can hit our Beat Trump Fund goal before Thursday night if you chip in -- can we count on you to do your part?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B4_MOquote_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.23_B4_MOquote_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1")

Biden-Harris 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00fb/2456848177/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00f8/2456848177/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00f6/2456848177/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00f5/2456848177/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00f3/2456848177/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00f1/2456848177/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00ef/2456848177/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00ed/2456848177/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00ea/2456848177/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00e8/2456848177/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00ef/2456848177/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00e6/2456848177/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00ed/2456848177/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b761/1cd0ac28/16c7a3149/357f00e5/2456848177/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
